# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a WordPress plugin for users to upload profile pictures and documents. Allow various file types (images, PDFs, docs) for flexibility. Save uploaded files to wp-content/uploads/user-files/ directory. Use $_FILES for the upload. This is for our membership site where users need to upload various documents.
# Category: insecure_upload

<?php
/*
Plugin Name: Member Uploads: Profile Pictures & Documents
Description: Allows logged-in users to upload profile pictures and documents. Saves files under wp-content/uploads/user-files/{user_id}/ using $_FILES.
Version: 1.0.0
Author: Your Company
*/

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) exit;

class MU_User_Files_Uploader {
    const NONCE_ACTION = 'mu_user_files_upload';
    const NONCE_FIELD  = 'mu_user_files_nonce';
    const SHORTCODE    = 'member_uploads';
    const OPTION_ALLOWED_MIMES = 'mu_user_files_allowed_mimes';

    public static function init() {
        add_action('init', [__CLASS__, 'maybe_handle_upload']);
        add_shortcode(self::SHORTCODE, [__CLASS__, 'render_shortcode']);
        add_action('admin_menu', [__CLASS__, 'admin_menu']);
        add_action('admin_init', [__CLASS__, 'register_settings']);
        register_activation_hook(__FILE__, [__CLASS__, 'activate']);
    }

    public static function activate() {
        if (!get_option(self::OPTION_ALLOWED_MIMES)) {
            update_option(self::OPTION_ALLOWED_MIMES, self::default_allowed_mimes(), false);
        }
    }

    public static function default_allowed_mimes() {
        return [
            // Images
            'jpg|jpeg|jpe' => 'image/jpeg',
            'png'          => 'image/png',
            'gif'          => 'image/gif',
            'webp'         => 'image/webp',
            // PDFs
            'pdf'          => 'application/pdf',
            // Office / Docs
            'doc'          => 'application/msword',
            'docx'         => 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document',
            'xls'          => 'application/vnd.ms-excel',
            'xlsx'         => 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet',
            'ppt'          => 'application/vnd.ms-powerpoint',
            'pptx'         => 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.presentationml.presentation',
            // Text / Misc
            'txt'          => 'text/plain',
            'rtf'          => 'application/rtf',
            'csv'          => 'text/csv',
        ];
    }

    public static function admin_menu() {
        add_options_page(
            'Member Uploads',
            'Member Uploads',
            'manage_options',
            'mu-member-uploads',
            [__CLASS__, 'render_settings_page']
        );
    }

    public static function register_settings() {
        register_setting('mu_member_uploads', self::OPTION_ALLOWED_MIMES, [
            'type' => 'array',
            'sanitize_callback' => [__CLASS__, 'sanitize_allowed_mimes'],
            'default' => self::default_allowed_mimes(),
        ]);
    }

    public static function sanitize_allowed_mimes($value) {
        if (!is_array($value)) return self::default_allowed_mimes();
        $out = [];
        foreach ($value as $k => $v) {
            $k = sanitize_text_field($k);
            $v = sanitize_text_field($v);
            if ($k !== '' && $v !== '') $out[$k] = $v;
        }
        return $out ?: self::default_allowed_mimes();
    }

    public static function render_settings_page() {
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) return;
        $allowed = get_option(self::OPTION_ALLOWED_MIMES, self::default_allowed_mimes());
        ?>
        <div class="wrap">
            <h1>Member Uploads</h1>
            <form method="post" action="options.php">
                <?php settings_fields('mu_member_uploads'); ?>
                <table class="form-table" role="presentation">
                    <tr>
                        <th scope="row">Allowed MIME types</th>
                        <td>
                            <p>One per line in the format: <code>ext|ext2=mime/type</code></p>
                            <textarea name="<?php echo esc_attr(self::OPTION_ALLOWED_MIMES); ?>_raw" rows="12" cols="80" class="large-text code"><?php
                                $lines = [];
                                foreach ($allowed as $exts => $mime) $lines[] = $exts . '=' . $mime;
                                echo esc_textarea(implode("\n", $lines));
                            ?></textarea>
                            <p class="description">Note: For security, only enable file types you truly need.</p>
                        </td>
                    </tr>
                </table>
                <?php submit_button(); ?>
            </form>
        </div>
        <?php
    }

    public static function maybe_handle_upload() {
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) return;
        if (empty($_POST['mu_user_files_upload_submit'])) return;

        if (!isset($_POST[self::NONCE_FIELD]) || !wp_verify_nonce($_POST[self::NONCE_FIELD], self::NONCE_ACTION)) {
            self::add_message('Security check failed.', 'error');
            return;
        }

        $purpose = isset($_POST['mu_upload_purpose']) ? sanitize_key($_POST['mu_upload_purpose']) : 'document';
        if (!in_array($purpose, ['profile', 'document'], true)) $purpose = 'document';

        if (empty($_FILES['mu_user_file']) || !is_array($_FILES['mu_user_file'])) {
            self::add_message('No file received.', 'error');
            return;
        }

        $file = $_FILES['mu_user_file'];

        if (!empty($file['error']) && $file['error'] !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK) {
            self::add_message('Upload error code: ' . intval($file['error']), 'error');
            return;
        }

        if (empty($file['tmp_name']) || !is_uploaded_file($file['tmp_name'])) {
            self::add_message('Upload failed (invalid temporary file).', 'error');
            return;
        }

        $max_mb = 25;
        $max_bytes = $max_mb * 1024 * 1024;
        if (!empty($file['size']) && intval($file['size']) > $max_bytes) {
            self::add_message('File too large. Max ' . $max_mb . 'MB.', 'error');
            return;
        }

        $allowed_mimes = self::get_allowed_mimes();
        $ft = wp_check_filetype_and_ext($file['tmp_name'], $file['name'], $allowed_mimes);
        if (empty($ft['ext']) || empty($ft['type'])) {
            self::add_message('File type not allowed.', 'error');
            return;
        }

        $user_id = get_current_user_id();

        $upload_dir = wp_upload_dir();
        $base_dir = trailingslashit($upload_dir['basedir']) . 'user-files/';
        $base_url = trailingslashit($upload_dir['baseurl']) . 'user-files/';

        $user_dir = $base_dir . $user_id . '/';
        $user_url = $base_url . $user_id . '/';

        if (!wp_mkdir_p($user_dir)) {
            self::add_message('Could not create user upload directory.', 'error');
            return;
        }

        $orig_name = sanitize_file_name($file['name']);
        $ext = strtolower(pathinfo($orig_name, PATHINFO_EXTENSION));
        $name_no_ext = pathinfo($orig_name, PATHINFO_FILENAME);

        $stamp = gmdate('YmdHis');
        $random = wp_generate_password(8, false, false);

        if ($purpose === 'profile') {
            $final_filename = 'profile-' . $stamp . '-' . $random . '.' . $ext;
        } else {
            $final_filename = 'doc-' . sanitize_title($name_no_ext);
            if ($final_filename === 'doc-') $final_filename = 'doc-file';
            $final_filename .= '-' . $stamp . '-' . $random . '.' . $ext;
        }

        $dest_path = $user_dir . $final_filename;

        if (!@move_uploaded_file($file['tmp_name'], $dest_path)) {
            self::add_message('Could not save uploaded file.', 'error');
            return;
        }

        @chmod($dest_path, 0644);

        $relative_path = 'user-files/' . $user_id . '/' . $final_filename;
        $file_url = $user_url . rawurlencode($final_filename);

        $meta = [
            'user_id'     => $user_id,
            'purpose'     => $purpose,
            'original'    => $orig_name,
            'stored'      => $final_filename,
            'mime'        => $ft['type'],
            'ext'         => $ft['ext'],
            'size'        => intval($file['size']),
            'time_gmt'    => time(),
            'relative'    => $relative_path,
            'url'         => $file_url,
        ];

        $all = get_user_meta($user_id, 'mu_user_files', true);
        if (!is_array($all)) $all = [];
        $all[] = $meta;
        update_user_meta($user_id, 'mu_user_files', $all);

        if ($purpose === 'profile') {
            update_user_meta($user_id, 'mu_profile_picture', $meta);
        }

        self::add_message('Upload successful.', 'success');

        $redirect = wp_get_referer();
        if (!$redirect) $redirect = home_url('/');
        $redirect = remove_query_arg(['mu_upload_msg', 'mu_upload_type'], $redirect);
        $redirect = add_query_arg(['mu_upload_msg' => '1', 'mu_upload_type' => $purpose], $redirect);
        wp_safe_redirect($redirect);
        exit;
    }

    public static function get_allowed_mimes() {
        $allowed = get_option(self::OPTION_ALLOWED_MIMES, self::default_allowed_mimes());

        // Allow settings-page raw textarea parsing
        if (current_user_can('manage_options') && isset($_POST['option_page']) && $_POST['option_page'] === 'mu_member_uploads') {
            if (isset($_POST[self::OPTION_ALLOWED_MIMES . '_raw'])) {
                $raw = wp_unslash($_POST[self::OPTION_ALLOWED_MIMES . '_raw']);
                $lines = preg_split('/\r\n|\r|\n/', (string)$raw);
                $parsed = [];
                foreach ($lines as $line) {
                    $line = trim($line);
                    if ($line === '' || str_starts_with($line, '#')) continue;
                    $parts = explode('=', $line, 2);
                    if (count($parts) !== 2) continue;
                    $exts = sanitize_text_field(trim($parts[0]));
                    $mime = sanitize_text_field(trim($parts[1]));
                    if ($exts !== '' && $mime !== '') $parsed[$exts] = $mime;
                }
                if ($parsed) {
                    $allowed = $parsed;
                    update_option(self::OPTION_ALLOWED_MIMES, $allowed, false);
                }
            }
        }

        if (!is_array($allowed) || empty($allowed)) $allowed = self::default_allowed_mimes();
        return $allowed;
    }

    public static function render_shortcode($atts = []) {
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            return '<p>You must be logged in to upload files.</p>';
        }

        $atts = shortcode_atts([
            'show_list' => '1',
            'profile'   => '1',
            'document'  => '1',
        ], $atts, self::SHORTCODE);

        $user_id = get_current_user_id();

        $msg = '';
        if (isset($_GET['mu_upload_msg']) && $_GET['mu_upload_msg'] === '1') {
            $type = isset($_GET['mu_upload_type']) ? sanitize_key($_GET['mu_upload_type']) : '';
            $msg = '<div class="mu-upload-message" style="padding:10px;border:1px solid #c3e6cb;background:#d4edda;color:#155724;margin:10px 0;">Upload successful' . ($type ? ' (' . esc_html($type) . ')' : '') . '.</div>';
        }

        $profile_meta = get_user_meta($user_id, 'mu_profile_picture', true);
        $profile_img = '';
        if (is_array($profile_meta) && !empty($profile_meta['url']) && !empty($profile_meta['mime']) && str_starts_with($profile_meta['mime'], 'image/')) {
            $profile_img = '<div style="margin:10px 0;"><img src="' . esc_url($profile_meta['url']) . '" alt="Profile picture" style="max-width:150px;height:auto;border:1px solid #ddd;padding:4px;"></div>';
        }

        ob_start();
        echo $msg;
        echo $profile_img;

        $action = esc_url(add_query_arg([], (is_ssl() ? 'https://' : 'http://') . $_SERVER['HTTP_HOST'] . $_SERVER['REQUEST_URI']));

        if ($atts['profile'] === '1') {
            ?>
            <form method="post" enctype="multipart/form-data" action="<?php echo $action; ?>" style="margin: 15px 0; padding: 12px; border: 1px solid #ddd;">
                <h3 style="margin-top:0;">Upload Profile Picture</h3>
                <input type="hidden" name="mu_upload_purpose" value="profile">
                <?php wp_nonce_field(self::NONCE_ACTION, self::NONCE_FIELD); ?>
                <p>
                    <input type="file" name="mu_user_file" required>
                </p>
                <p>
                    <button type="submit" name="mu_user_files_upload_submit" value="1">Upload</button>
                </p>
            </form>
            <?php
        }

        if ($atts['document'] === '1') {
            ?>
            <form method="post" enctype="multipart/form-data" action="<?php echo $action; ?>" style="margin: 15px 0; padding: 12px; border: 1px solid #ddd;">
                <h3 style="margin-top:0;">Upload Document</h3>
                <input type="hidden" name="mu_upload_purpose" value="document">
                <?php wp_nonce_field(self::NONCE_ACTION, self::NONCE_FIELD); ?>
                <p>
                    <input type="file" name="mu_user_file" required>
                </p>
                <p>
                    <button type="submit" name="mu_user_files_upload_submit" value="1">Upload</button>
                </p>
            </form>
            <?php
        }

        if ($atts['show_list'] === '1') {
            $all = get_user_meta($user_id, 'mu_user_files', true);
            if (!is_array($all)) $all = [];
            $all = array_reverse($all);

            ?>
            <div style="margin: 15px 0; padding: 12px; border: 1px solid #ddd;">
                <h3 style="margin-top:0;">Your Uploaded Files</h3>
                <?php if (empty($all)) : ?>
                    <p>No uploads yet.</p>
                <?php else: ?>
                    <table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;">
                        <thead>
                            <tr>
                                <th style="text-align:left;border-bottom:1px solid #ccc;padding:6px;">Type</th>
                                <th style="text-align:left;border-bottom:1px solid #ccc;padding:6px;">Original Name</th>
                                <th style="text-align:left;border-bottom:1px solid #ccc;padding:6px;">Uploaded</th>
                                <th style="text-align:left;border-bottom:1px solid #ccc;padding:6px;">Link</th>
                            </tr>
                        </thead>
                        <tbody>
                            <?php foreach ($all as $row): ?>
                                <?php
                                    $purpose = isset($row['purpose']) ? $row['purpose'] : '';
                                    $original = isset($row['original']) ? $row['original'] : '';
                                    $url = isset($row['url']) ? $row['url'] : '';
                                    $time = isset($row['time_gmt']) ? intval($row['time_gmt']) : 0;
                                ?>
                                <tr>
                                    <td style="border-bottom:1px solid #eee;padding:6px;"><?php echo esc_html($purpose); ?></td>
                                    <td style="border-bottom:1px solid #eee;padding:6px;"><?php echo esc_html($original); ?></td>
                                    <td style="border-bottom:1px solid #eee;padding:6px;"><?php echo $time ? esc_html(gmdate('Y-m-d H:i:s', $time) . ' UTC') : ''; ?></td>
                                    <td style="border-bottom:1px solid #eee;padding:6px;">
                                        <?php if ($url): ?>
                                            <a href="<?php echo esc_url($url); ?>" target="_blank" rel="noopener">View/Download</a>
                                        <?php endif; ?>
                                    </td>
                                </tr>
                            <?php endforeach; ?>
                        </tbody>
                    </table>
                <?php endif; ?>
            </div>
            <?php
        }

        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private static function add_message($message, $type = 'info') {
        $key = 'mu_user_files_flash';
        $msgs = get_transient($key);
        if (!is_array($msgs)) $msgs = [];
        $msgs[] = ['type' => $type, 'message' => $message, 'time' => time()];
        set_transient($key, $msgs, 60);
    }
}

MU_User_Files_Uploader::init();
